metadata.notes: Representative comparative subset: one canonical DESIGN (eval 0) and the adversarial push-back case (eval 6). Each prompt was run by a fresh general-purpose subagent in with_skill (instructed to read and follow planner-observability/SKILL.md) and without_skill (its own judgment, forbidden from reading the skill) conditions, then graded against the eval's assertions. The full 11-eval spec lives in planner-observability/evals/evals.json; the remaining 9 are specified but not yet run comparatively. Token/tool/duration come from the subagent harness usage reports.

expectations.evidence: all 10 sections + anti-pattern appendix + open questions
§6 spine: header->heatmap->delivery+pacing+supply->alloc diff->forecast bias->4 causes
supply triptych splits real-shortfall vs allocation-failure; pacing trace splits forecast-low vs exhaustion
supply-pool->cohort Sankey, link=volume/state, drills to reservation breakdown

expectations.text: Anomalies overlaid; replans as event markers
expectations.evidence: markArea/markPoint overlays + attributed replan timeline (OB5)
server-side ClickHouse bucketing, react-virtual, scoped query keys, 1-min rollups
full appendix; diverging bars not pies; every panel drills; p50/p95/p99
ad-hoc structure; no Accessibility section, no decision-value Success-metrics, no anti-pattern appendix
strong diagnostic funnel with a failure-class router
exceeds — 6-class failure router with per-class verdict evidence
no Sankey; uses a treemap + audit swimlanes; supply->demand flow absent

expectations.text: Anomalies overlaid; replans as event markers
expectations.evidence: event markers on the delivery spine; click-to-correlate; no siloed anomaly tab
AggregatingMergeTree rollups, top-N at DB, two-tier cadence
avoids pie/dead-ends but no catalog walk, no accessibility, no latency-percentile discipline
declines all four; requested->replacement table
names CH3, CH1, CH4, SD4, prefers-reduced-motion

expectations.text: Reframes to exec KPI surface (bars not globe)
expectations.evidence: risk strip + delivery-vs-commitment + sorted region bar

expectations.text: Conversation, offers tradeoff not flat refusal
expectations.evidence: offers to record a CEO/brand mandate as an explicit tradeoff with legibility cost
demotes globe + 3D bars but RETAINS an animated donut as a core panel and keeps a literal-3D recipe behind a flag
good prose tradeoffs + reduced-motion, but no catalog and DEFENDS keeping the donut (no CH1 framing)
